x-deprecated-canon: Stack V4 GHL-Out · use POST /api/email/send (Resend backend) · /api/ghl/send-email is 410 Gone stub. See wiki/decisions/2026-05-21-ghl-mcp-deprecation-stack-v4.md.
title: POST /api/ghl/send-email (DEPRECATED · 410 Gone · use /api/email/send)
description: DEPRECATED Stack V4 GHL-Out 2026-05-20 · canonical replacement is POST /api/email/send (Resend). Contract preserved for migration audit-trail only. Required: to_email + subject + body. Optional: contact_id, template_id, client_id, reply_to, from_name.

body.description: HTML or plain-text body. GHL accepts both.
